home.title: Ready-to-use puzzle tools
home.description: Use fast Dead Frontier 2 tools for puzzle clues, mission lookups, official links, and the everyday resources players open most.

resources.title: Frequently used Dead Frontier 2 resources
resources.description: Keep the official channels close and pin the best community references for missions, maps, and everyday lookups.

support.label: Support Portal
support.description: The official customer support site for account issues, reports, and other service requests.

discord.label: Official Discord
discord.description: Join the main Dead Frontier 2 Discord server for announcements, community discussion, and live help from other players.

missions.label: DF2 Haven Mission Guide
missions.description: A free unofficial mission guide maintained by fellow players and updated daily with current mission details.

map.label: DF2 Profiler Mission Map
map.description: A free unofficial mission map that is updated every day and helps you track mission locations faster.

wiki.label: Fandom Wiki
wiki.description: A broad reference wiki for Dead Frontier 2 items, systems, and archived community knowledge.

header.dialogDescription: Jump to a tool or a useful external resource

binary.label: Binary Converter
binary.description: Switch quickly between binary groups and numeric clues.

alphaNumeric.label: Letter Number Converter
alphaNumeric.description: Convert quickly between letter indexes and number clues.

wordFinder.label: Word Finder
wordFinder.description: Find possible words from missing-letter patterns or scrambled letters.

morse.label: Morse Converter
morse.description: Convert quickly between Morse code and alphanumeric text.

lightsOut.label: Lights Out
lightsOut.description: Adjust the board, edit light states, and inspect the solving presses.

slidingPuzzle.label: Sliding Puzzle
slidingPuzzle.description: Switch images and sizes, move tiles, and inspect the current solution.

binary.title: Binary Converter
binary.description: Turn binary groups into digits, or convert digits back into binary groups.
binary.inputDescriptionBinaryToDigits: Enter binary groups separated by spaces, such as 101 11 110.
binary.inputDescriptionDigitsToBinary: Enter a string of digits such as 5362.
binary.emptyState: Results will appear here as soon as you start typing.

errors.invalidBinaryCharacters: Binary groups can only contain 0 and 1.
errors.binaryOutOfRange: Each binary group must resolve to a single digit between 0 and 9.
errors.invalidDigits: Only digits from 0 to 9 are supported.

letterNumber.title: Letter Number Converter
letterNumber.description: Convert number indexes into letters, or turn A-I clues back into digits.
letterNumber.inputDescriptionNumbersToLetters: Use spaces between values from 1 to 26, such as 20 8 5.
letterNumber.inputDescriptionLettersToNumbers: Enter letters from A to I. Lowercase works too.
letterNumber.emptyState: Results will appear here as soon as you start typing.

wordFinder.title: Word Finder
wordFinder.description: Find possible words from clue patterns or a full set of scrambled letters.

inputDescription.pattern: Use letters for known positions and _, ?, or * for single-letter blanks.
inputDescription.anagram: Enter every letter in the word once. The order can be scrambled.

rulesDescription.pattern: Spaces and extra symbols are ignored. The tool matches both letter positions and word length, then groups every match for you.
rulesDescription.anagram: Spaces and non-letters are ignored. A result only appears when it uses exactly the same letters with the same length.

wordFinder.emptyCategory: No matches in this category yet.
wordFinder.idleAnagram: Matches will appear here after you enter the full letter set.

noResults.pattern: No words matched this pattern in the current word bank.
noResults.anagram: No words in the current word bank can be built from this letter set.

wordFinder.resultsSummary: Possible matches are grouped by word length.

morse.title: Morse Converter
morse.description: Decode Morse groups or encode letters and digits for quick clue checks.
morse.inputDescriptionMorseToText: Enter any number of Morse groups separated by spaces.
morse.inputDescriptionTextToMorse: Enter any number of alphanumeric characters such as 1AB9.
morse.emptyState: Results will appear here as soon as you start typing.

lightsOut.title: Lights Out
lightsOut.description: Adjust the board, edit the light pattern, and show the presses needed to light every cell.
lightsOut.solutionDescription: The board shows numbered markers, and the required presses are listed here as well.
lightsOut.solutionHint: Press the highlighted lights on the board or follow the list below. Order does not matter.
lightsOut.solutionCollapsedHint: {count} more steps are hidden. Expand the list to see the full sequence.
lightsOut.alreadySolved: The board is already fully lit.
lightsOut.noSolution: This board cannot be turned fully on with cross toggles.
lightsOut.rulesDescription: By default, each press toggles the center light plus its up, down, left, and right neighbors. In edit mode, only the clicked light changes so you can build custom setups.

slidingPuzzle.title: Sliding Puzzle
slidingPuzzle.description: Switch images and sizes, move tiles by tap or drag, and inspect the current solution.
slidingPuzzle.boardDescription: Tap to move a tile next to the empty space. Dragging swaps any two positions, and the UI keeps highlighting the next recommended move.
slidingPuzzle.controlsDescription: Adjust the size, reset or shuffle the layout, and toggle numbers and guidance.
slidingPuzzle.imageDescription: Choose the picture to slice into tiles. Switching images keeps the current layout.
slidingPuzzle.solutionDescription: Shows the shortest ordered steps for the current board and highlights the next suggested tile.
slidingPuzzle.solutionHint: Order matters in a sliding puzzle, so follow the sequence from top to bottom.
slidingPuzzle.solutionCollapsedHint: {count} more moves are hidden. Expand the list to see the full sequence.
slidingPuzzle.solutionHidden: The solution list is currently hidden.
slidingPuzzle.noSolution: This board is currently unsolvable, usually because of a drag swap. Reset to return to a solvable state.

nextMoveStates.unsolvable: This board is unsolvable, so there is no next move to show.
nextMoveStates.solved: The puzzle is solved, so no next move is needed.

slidingPuzzle.hintDescription: Move tile {tile} {direction} to continue the solution. The board outline and badge will match this hint.
slidingPuzzle.hintSolved: The puzzle is already solved. Use shuffle or reset if you want to start again.
slidingPuzzle.rulesDescription: The board starts solved. Clicking only moves tiles next to the empty slot. Dragging can swap any two cells, which means it can also create unsolvable states. Turning on numbers shows each tile's original order in the bottom-left corner.
